title: Layout Engineer
description:
Job Description:

You will be responsible for developing the physical layout of CMOS/BiCDMOS Integrated Circuit designs used in high-performance, high-speed analog ICs for SerDes applications, as well as for Automotive and Industrial Battery Management Systems. These products will enable the next generation of data communication systems using high-speed wireline transmission and empower the electrification of vehicles to achieve carbon neutrality. You will work closely with circuit design engineers both locally and overseas to deliver robust, high-quality layouts that meet stringent performance, signal integrity and reliability requirements.

Key responsiblities:

  • Design high-quality block and top block-level IC layouts for analog, mixed-signal, and high-speed interface circuits
  • Ensure that designs comply with foundry-specific rule like the DRC and LVS and support post-layout extraction and debugging
  • Apply good layout techniques to meet matching, signal integrity, reliability requirements and good post layout performance
  • Apply the best practices for 28nm, 22nm planar CMOS and FinFET technologies, including device placement, routing constraints and process-specific rules
  • Collaborate closely with circuit designers and layout designers to optimize layout performance
  • Contribute to layout methodology improvements, automation scripts and documentation
  • Prepare and maintain accurate documentation of layout output, verification result judgement and explain them during design review

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering or Diploma with relevant experience
  • Good knowledge in IC layout design, verification and design rule checking
  • Proficiency in IC design software, such as Cadence Virtuoso, Synopsys IC Compiler and Mentor Graphics Calibre
  • Strong understanding of CMOS design principles, semiconductor manufacturing processes and design-for-manufacturability techniques
  • Good problem-solving skills, attention to detail and capability to work effectively in a team environment with good communication skills
  • Experience with 28nm, 22nm planar CMOS and FinFET technologies will be a plus
  • 2-5 years of analog IC layout design experience will be a plus. Fresh graduates from semiconductor(IC) design related course are also welcome to apply.

postedCompany.description:
Nuvoton Technology Corporation (NTC) was founded to bring innovative semiconductor solutions to the market. NTC was spun-off as a Winbond Electronics affiliate in July 2008 and went public in September 2010 on the Taiwan Stock Exchange (TSE). Nuvoton Technology focuses on the developments of microcontroller, microprocessor, smart home and cloud security IC and has strong market share in Industrial, Consumer and Computer markets. Nuvoton owns a wafer fab, featuring customized processes for analog and power products. Besides in-house IC products, the wafer fab also provides part of its capacity for foundry services. Nuvoton Technology provides products with a high performance/cost ratio for its customers by leveraging flexible technology, advanced design capability, and integration of digital and analog technologies. Nuvoton values long term relationships with its partners and customers and is dedicated to continuous innovation of its products, processes, and services. The company has established subsidiaries in the USA, China, Israel, India, Singapore, Korea and Japan to strengthen regional customer support and global management.


On 1st September 2020, Nuvoton Technology Singapore Pte Ltd (NTSG) was established in Singapore. Our Product Applications are - Automotive electric vehicle, Electric bikes, Energy storage system, Servers, 4/8K display, AR/VR headset, Inverter aircon/fridge/washing machine,  Automotive cluster/HUD/Electric mirror, Robot/Industrial machine vision, Automotive image sensing, etc

NTSG activities aim to expand NTC group business to worldwide in the Battery Application, Spatial Sensing, Edge AI and Asian Outsource Assembly & Test commissioned control.
postedCompany.name: NUVOTON TECHNOLOGY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
